Created attachment 177679
Maintainer Approved: freeswitch-1.6.13 svn diff from ports BASE

Maintainer update to freeswitch 1.6.13

Changes included in update:

* Fix BROKEN=
* Updated from 1.6.8 to 1.6.13
* Added explicit dependency on libspeexdsp.so:audio/speexdsp
* Added ssl and libedit to USES

The following files should be removed from SVN:

files/patch-configure
files/patch-src_mod_applications_mod__avmd_avmd__fast__acosf.c
